reviews.comment:
Está bien por qué encontrar en la punta una estación de servicio es un deseo hecho realidad. Pero es precaria en comparación con otras

(Translated by Google)
Finding a gas station at the end of the road is a dream come true. But it's basic compared to others.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3bHItcFpBEAE

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) Extensive network of gas stations with a good selection of products and an attentive and helpful staff.

(Original)
Rede de postos ampla com boa seleção de produtos e equipe atenciosa e prestativa.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBcGRqX2ZREAE

reviews.comment:
Muy buen café, especial para una parada de descanso en medio de un largo viaje, lugar confortable para sentarse y disfrutar del paisaje.

(Translated by Google)
Very good coffee, perfect for a rest stop in the middle of a long journey, a comfortable place to sit and enjoy the scenery.

reviews.comment:
La atencion de la mayoria de los empleados es bueno .  Salvo uno que tiene malas mañas . Se hace el distraido para darte el vuelto . Paso en varias oportunidades .

(Translated by Google)
Most of the employees are friendly, except for one who has bad habits. He pretends not to notice you when giving you your change. This has happened several times.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBZ2F1SFZ3EAE

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) I don't know why they seem to dislike Brazilians. One of the waitresses treated us very badly. One star for the media luna (crescent roll).

(Original)
Não sei porque parecem não gostar de brasileiros. Uma atendente nos tratou muito mal. Uma estrela para a media luna

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) It's one of the last places to refuel before reaching Paso de Jama on the border with Chile. It's a simple gas station with just fuel pumps. Next to it is a great hotel and restaurant. What the gas station lacks, the restaurant makes up for in convenience and very clean restrooms.

(Original)
É um dos últimos lugares para se abastecer antes de chegar em Passo de Jama divisa com o Chile. Posto simples apenas com as bombas de combustível. Ao lado tem um hotel e restaurante ótimos. O que o posto não tem o restaurante tem como conveniência e banheiros bem limpos.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1243722777492158217/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3N01lMlhREAE
